threshold_strategy: Threshold selected on validation set by maximum F1; test set used only once for reporting.
class_imbalance_strategy: Class-weighted primary models where applicable; no SMOTE or row duplication.
primary_interpretation: ML benchmark evaluates internal learnability under leakage-aware session-wise splitting. It does not prove real-world deployment accuracy.
future_drop_interpretation: The future dropped-connection endpoint is a controlled synthetic risk benchmark with enriched failure prevalence. It is not an estimate of real-world dropped-connection frequency.
